heroHeadline: Two Days to Pahalgam Anniversary: Civil Defence Drill Cancelled in Poonch; Kashmir at Maximum Security Alert
heroSubtitle: A civil defence air raid drill in Poonch border district was cancelled on April 20 without full explanation, sparking public anxiety amid Operation Sindoor memories — two days before the first anniversary of the Pahalgam massacre. Kashmir's tourist sites are under unified command maximum deployment; the Indian Embassy in Washington prepares the 'Human Cost of Terrorism' Capitol Hill exhibition for April 22; India-Pakistan backchannel talks continue via IISS Track 1.5 despite frozen official ties.
footerNote: Data sourced from Indian MEA/MOD, Pakistan ISPR/MFA, UN Security Council, SIPRI, Crisis Group, HRW, Stimson Center
